Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»South Africa wins THIRD medal at Paris 2024 Paralympics

South Africa’s Pieter du Preez won South Africa’s third medal at the Paris 2024 Paralympics on Wednesday. Congratulations!

South Africa’sPieter du Preezwon South Africa’sthirdmedal at theParis 2024 Paralympicson Wednesday.

For the latest Paris Paralympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Du Preez took the bronze medal in theH1 Individual Time Trialwhen he crossed the finish line in third place in a time of 36:07.05.

Italy’s Fabrizio Cornegliani took gold in 34:50.45, while Maxime Hordies from Belgium took silver in 35:11.13.

Du Preez won the gold medal in the event at the most recent Paralympics held in Tokyo in 2021.

The medal was Team South Africa’s third of this year’s Paralympics.

Mpumelelo Mhlongowon goldin the men’s T44 100m whileLouzanne Coetzeedoubled Team SA’s medal tally when shewon the bronze medalin the 1 500m in the T11 class.
